last_assistant_message:
Bootstrap complete. Here's what was produced:

**5 decision-candidate event shards** written to `.agents/memory/daily/2026-04-03/events/`, plus a daily summary. All 5 were promoted to ADRs:

| ADR | Decision |
|---|---|
| 0001 | Registry-based lazy provider loading + optional extras (SemVer 2.0.0 break) |
| 0002 | YAML-driven middleware profile as sole source of truth; opaque to callers |
| 0003 | Two middleware roles — text-transform (fail-hard) vs lifecycle/observability (fail-open) |
| 0004 | Unified tool-calling abstraction with firm per-vendor API choices |
| 0005 | Google API-key auth as the default for all Google-backed providers |

Source: primarily the 2026-04-03 major commit (`7748caf`) and its nine accompanying design docs under `docs/`. ADRs 0001, 0002, and 0004 are flagged `must_read: true`.
